make me enter! (command to Allah in prayer)
a place of entry (object of أَدْخِلْنِى)
and make me go out! (connected to أَدْخِلْنِى/make me enter)
and make! (command to make something for yourself)
from (connects لَّدُنكَ to what comes before)
and we send down (repeatedly) (this Quran mentioned in مِنَ ٱلْقُرْءَانِ)
that which (connects شِفَآءٌ to the previous statement)
a healing, a cure (describes what القرآن provides)
he increases (the loss of ٱلظَّالِمِينَ/the wrongdoers)
except (excludes خَسَارًا/loss from the previous statement about the Quran)
and when (introduces a condition about أَنْعَمْنَا - We bestow favors)
the human being (subject of أَعْرَضَ - turned away)
he turned away (from the truth mentioned in أَنْعَمْنَا)
the evil (subject of مَسَّهُ - touched him)
he works/acts/does (subject doing action according to his way in شَاكِلَتِهِ)
about who/whom (connected to أَعْلَمُ - more knowing)
to cause to be guided, to guide someone
the spirit/soul (subject of the question being asked)
a little (of the knowledge that was given)
we will most certainly go away
to you (object of أَوْحَيْنَا - we revealed)
then (connects to لَنَذْهَبَنَّ - we would take away)
gathered together (referring to الإنس والجن - mankind and jinn)
the humans (subject of يَأْتُونَ - they bring)
with/by a similar thing (of هٰذَا ٱلْقُرْءَانِ)
they come (referring to humans and jinn together)
with something similar to it (referring to القُرْءَانِ)
and even if (connects to يَأْتُونَ - they bring)
he/it was (describing the state of بَعْضُهُمْ - some of them)
a helper/supporter (for others against this Quran)
we explained thoroughly (in this Quran for mankind)
for/to the people (in هٰذَا ٱلْقُرْءَانِ - this Quran)
from (showing the source of كُلِّ مَثَلٍ - every example)
and they said (subject of لَن نُّؤْمِنَ)
for you/to you (object of قَالُوا - they said)
you make (something) burst forth (in response to لَن نُّؤْمِنَ لَكَ)
a spring/fountain (object of تَفْجُرَ - you cause to gush forth)
or (connecting تَكُونَ with what came before)
from/of (describing what جَنَّةٌ 'garden' is made of)
and then you make (something) burst forth forcefully (connected to تَكُونَ)
the rivers (object of فَتُفَجِّرَ - 'then you cause to gush forth')
with a forceful bursting forth (describing how the rivers flow in فَتُفَجِّرَ الْأَنْهٰرَ)
the sky (as the object being acted upon)
just as, like what (connects to زَعَمْتَ - you claimed)
upon us (object of تُسْقِطَ - you cause to fall)
pieces (object of تُسْقِطَ - to make fall)
or (connects تُسْقِطَ 'you cause to fall' with تَأْتِىَ 'you bring')
as a group/tribe (describing how Allah and the angels would come)
for you/to you (addressed to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)
and never/will not (negates نُّؤْمِنَ - we will believe)
for your going up (connected to نُّؤْمِنَ - we will believe)
you send down repeatedly (addressing the Prophet ﷺ)
a book (that is being sent down)
except (connecting to بَشَرًا رَّسُولًا - a human messenger)
a human being (object of كُنتُ - I was)
he prevented (subject of prevented الناس/the people from believing)
the people (as the ones being prevented from believing)
when (connects to جَآءَهُمُ - came to them)
a human being (object of أَبَعَثَ - did He send)
say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ to tell the disbelievers)
he was (describing what مَلٰٓئِكَةٌ/angels were like)
they walk/are walking (referring to angels in مَلٰٓئِكَةٌ)
those who are feeling safe and at peace (walking on earth)
an angel (object of لَنَزَّلْنَا - we would have sent down)
a messenger (object of لَنَزَّلْنَا - we would have sent down)
he was sufficient (subject of قُلْ - say)
by Allah (as a witness in شَهِيدًۢا)
as a witness (between me and you)
and between you all (paired with بَيْنِى meaning 'between me and you all')
All-Aware (describing Allah as the object of كَانَ - He was)
All-Seeing (describing how Allah was with His servants in كَانَ بِعِبَادِهِۦ)
he guides (after مَن in a conditional phrase)
Allah (the one true God who guides)
he causes (someone) to lose the way (subject: اللَّهُ)
you will find (after فَلَن meaning 'will never')
protectors/guardians (object of تَجِدَ - you will find)
and we will gather them (on يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيٰمَةِ - Day of Resurrection)
on the day (object of وَنَحْشُرُهُمْ - We will gather them)
the resurrection (يَوْمَ الْقِيٰمَةِ - Day of Resurrection)
blind (describing how they will be gathered)
and mute ones (as objects of نَحْشُرُهُمْ)
and deaf ones (as objects of نَحْشُرُهُمْ - we will gather them)
their place of shelter/refuge (emphasized because it refers to Hell)
it (the fire) died down (subject of جَهَنَّمُ)
a blazing fire (object of زِدْنٰهُمْ - We increased them)
we were (subject of أَءِنَّا لَمَبْعُوثُونَ - 'will we be resurrected?')
and (into) dust/tiny fragments (object of كُنَّا - we became)
indeed/surely ones who are raised up
they see (referring to the disbelievers in أَفَأَبَى ٱلظَّٰلِمُونَ)
Allah (as the object of أَنَّ - that)
the one who (connects خَلَقَ with اللَّهَ)
of the heavens/skies (object of خَلَقَ - created)
like them (refers to creating others similar to the disbelievers)
in it (referring to أَجَلًا/the appointed term)
and so he refused/rejected (as a result of seeing Allah's power)
total rejection (as the thing being rejected in أَبَى)
you all (when talking to a group)
then, in that case (result of تَمْلِكُونَ - you possess)
surely you all would have withheld
signs, miracles, verses (acted on by تِسْعَ)
clear signs/proofs (referring to the nine signs given to Moses)
Israel (servant of God) - name of Prophet Jacob (يَعْقُوب)
when (referring to جَآءَهُمْ - he came to them)
he definitely came to them (referring to the Children of Israel mentioned earlier)
indeed I (subject of لَأَظُنُّكَ - I surely think)
surely I think you (speaking to مُوسَىٰ)
bewitched/enchanted (object of لَأَظُنُّكَ - I surely think you are)
these ones (pointing to things mentioned in this ayah)
and of the earth (possessed by رَبُّ)
surely I think you (are) (speaking to Pharaoh)
so/then he intended/wanted (with purpose) (subject of يَسْتَفِزَّهُم)
he tries to drive them out (of الْأَرْضِ)
so we drowned him (after فَأَرَادَ - he wanted)
all together (describing how something was done)
the earth (object of اسْكُنُوا - dwell in)
all together (describing how جِئْنَا 'we brought' was done)
and with/by the truth (connected to نَزَلَ - it descended)
and with the truth (connected to أَنزَلْنٰهُ - we sent it down)
he descended (connected to أَنزَلْنٰهُ in this ayah)
and not (connects to previous verse while negating أَرْسَلْنٰكَ)
as a bearer of good news (object of أَرْسَلْنٰكَ - We sent you)
and a warner (connected to مُبَشِّرًا - bearer of good news)
and a recitation (object of فَرَقْنٰهُ - we divided it)
we divided/separated it (the Quran) into parts (for gradual revelation)
so that you read/recite it (purpose of فَرَقْنٰهُ - We divided it)
upon/over (indicates position above something in relation to ٱلنَّاسِ)
with deliberation/slowly (describing how the Quran was revealed)
and we sent it down gradually (referring to the Quran)
a sending down (object of وَنَزَّلْنٰهُ - and We sent it down)
say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ to speak to the disbelievers)
or (connecting 'believe in it' with 'do not believe')
those who (as the subject of يَخِرُّونَ - they fall)
they were given (subject of يَخِرُّونَ - they fall)
the knowledge (object of أُوتُوا - were given)
from (connects قَبْلِهِۦٓ to what came before)
upon them (subject of يَخِرُّونَ - they fall)
to the chins (they fall upon in يَخِرُّونَ)
falling into prostration (describing how they fall in يَخِرُّونَ)
absolutely perfect and free from all flaws (describing رَبِّنَآ - our Lord)
our Lord (the one who cares for us)
and they fall down prostrate (to their chins يَبْكُونَ while they cry)
to the chins (they fall upon them in يَخِرُّونَ)
and he increases them (connected to يَبْكُونَ - they cry)
in humble submission (describing how they fall down)
Allah (as the object being called upon)
you all call upon (command to multiple people)
so for Him (referring to اللَّهَ or الرَّحْمٰنَ)
the most beautiful, the best (feminine) (describing الْأَسْمَآءُ - the names)
she was made to lower her voice
with it/her (referring to صَلَاتِكَ - your prayer)
that (pointing to something not very close)
all praise (subject of belongs to اللَّهِ)
he takes for himself (negated by لَمْ)
surely for him (connected to يَكُن - was)
with great declaration of His greatness (object of كَبِّرْ)
